label: Library Doc Status
description: Lifecycle status for a LIBRARY_DOC (CASE-518). Library-local (NOT kb-libdev's KB_DOC_STATUS) so the library namespace exports/imports as a self-contained unit. Generated docs default published; deprecated marks a stale/superseded release line. mutable.

terms.label: Published
terms.description: Live library content. Default for generated docs.

terms.label: Deprecated
terms.description: Stale / superseded release line; kept resolvable.
